The '''''Nune''-class Imperial shuttle''' was a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] used by the [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|new Galactic Empire]] as of [[137 ABY]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:NuneClassImperialShuttle-Legacy2006-10.jpg|thumb|left|150px|[[Mingo Bovark]]'s [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] docked at [[The Wheel/Legends|the Wheel]].]]

The Nune-class shuttle, standard in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], is the successor to the Lambda-class shuttle of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Much larger and more versatile than typical shuttles, it functions as a cargo hauler, troop dropship, or personal transport as needed. The ''Nune''-class shuttle had a much larger capacity for cargo or people than previous Imperial shuttles such as the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class]] and [[Theta-class T-2c shuttle/Legends|''Theta''-class]]. It also kept the folding wings feature of those classes, but unlike its precursors it could land with its wings unfolded. When armed, ''Nune''-class shuttles were equipped with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]].<ref name=":0">[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide|''Legacy Era Campaign Guide'']]</ref>

Its modular interior allows quick reconfiguration, and Navy technicians are trained in its modification. While most are adaptable, some serve dedicated roles as luxury transports for [[Admiral/Legends|Admirals]], [[Moff/Legends|Moffs]], and [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomats]], often assigned to flagships or high-profile vessels. There was at least [[Unidentified Nune-class shuttle variant|one variant]] of this model.<ref name=":0" />

==History==
[[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Roan Fel]] used one such [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] to reach [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]].

[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Mingo Bovark]] used [[Unidentified Nune-class Imperial shuttle|another]] to travel from an [[Ardent-class fast frigate|''Ardent''-class fast frigate]] to [[The Wheel/Legends|the Wheel]] during negotiations with the [[Core Fleet|Galactic Alliance Core Fleet]].

[[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Azard]] kept a [[Darth Azard's Nune-class shuttle|personal shuttle]] which was hijacked by [[Monia Gahan]] and [[Sigel Dare]].
